name: ‚ÄãDubsado
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Dubsado Does

‚ÄãDubsado is built for white glove agencies. If you charge $5,000 for a website project or $2,000 per month for high-end strategy retainers, the presentation of your process matters. Dubsado lets you create interactive, fully branded proposals that feel like mini sales pages and reinforce a premium client experience.

Source: Dubsado

‚ÄãKey Features

  • ‚ÄãInteractive Proposals: Allows clients to select a package, sign the contract, and pay the deposit on one screen.
  • ‚ÄãClient Portals: A dedicated, branded space where clients see every invoice and contract. It includes 3 additional users for free on most plans.
  • ‚ÄãWorkflow Automation: Triggers like ‚ÄúSend 'Welcome Guide' once contract is signed‚Äù help you look organized from day one.

‚ÄãBenefits of Dubsado

  • ‚ÄãHigher Close Rates: When your proposals look this professional, you can justify higher price points.
  • ‚ÄãSeamless Onboarding: It removes the friction between a ‚Äúyes‚Äù and a signed contract.
  • Track Progress: Identify revenue patterns, compare month-by-month goals, and pipeline health.

‚ÄãPricing

  • ‚ÄãStarter Plan: $35/month 
  • ‚ÄãPremier Plan: $55/month.
  • ‚ÄãAdd-on Brands: $10/month per additional brand.

Discounts are available on annual billing.

‚ÄãPros

‚Äã‚úÖ The gold standard for branded, interactive proposals.

‚úÖ Very affordable for solo or small boutique agencies.

‚ÄãCons

‚Äãüö´ No fulfillment tools (you still need separate software for SEO/Ads).

üö´ Automation does not scale well for very large teams (30+ users).

‚Äç

What Customers Say

‚ÄúIt‚Äôs brilliant for keeping contracts, invoices, scheduling, and time tracking all in one place. The first time I sent a proposal to a client, it was accepted, the contract signed, and the invoice paid within 5 minutes of me sending it.‚Äù

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com.
